parameters.jsCode:
var body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;

return [{ json: {
  ticketId: body.ticketId || body.data?.ticketId,
  numero: body.numero || body.data?.numero,
  nom: body.nom || body.data?.nom,
  prenom: body.prenom || body.data?.prenom,
  email: body.email || body.data?.email,
  telephone: body.telephone || body.data?.telephone || '',
  entreprise: body.entreprise || body.data?.entreprise || '',
  sujet: body.sujet || body.data?.sujet,
  message: body.message || body.data?.message,
  categorie: body.categorie || body.data?.categorie || 'general',
  priorite: body.priorite || body.data?.priorite || 'normale'
} }];

parameters.subject: =Ticket {{ $json.numero }} - Confirmation de votre demande
=🎫 Nouveau ticket {{ $json.numero }} - {{ $json.sujet }}
